'''Ujin Voli''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who was the leader of the [[Antar Band]], a criminal organization active in the area of space around the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]].

Voli had a strong rivalry with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Sprax]], another [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] active on the Sisar Run, though Sprax's operations were much more vast than Voli's.

Voli owned a small hideout in an abandoned religious temple in [[Temptation Canyon]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]. Voli also owned a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] called the ''[[Cones of Silence]]''.
